purpose: P2 receives P1 single-geometry runtime specs and prepares them for IUT-heavy mediation, comparison, invariant handling, and cross-geometry composition. P2 is the first layer where inter-geometry relations become first-class.

design_rule.core_definition: P2 builds IUT mediation handoff bundles from verified P1 runtime specs.

field_notes.p2_layer: Must be P2 for this schema.
field_notes.input_program_ids: One or more P1 runtime specs used as P2 inputs.
field_notes.geom_ids: Cross-layer geometry ids participating in the mediation.
field_notes.comparison_targets: Which geometry objects/relations should be compared or mapped.
field_notes.invariant_targets: Invariants P2 should preserve or test under IUT mediation.
field_notes.iut_operator_family: Named IUT mediation family to be used by KQ/P2.
field_notes.proof_kernel_targets: Which KQ proof kernels are expected to participate.
field_notes.compatibility_contract: Preconditions that must hold before IUT mediation runs.
field_notes.ready_for_l3: Whether this mediation bundle is ready for L3 local/limit Euclid recovery evaluation.
